title: bidens parviflora
intro: Bidens parviflora, also known as Small Burr Marigold, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Bidens parviflora include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Bidens parviflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
